defs: The supreme male divinity of the Phoenician and Canaanitish nations.
notes: ☞ The name of this god occurs in the Old Testament and elsewhere with qualifying epithets subjoined, answering to the different ideas of his character; as, Baal-berith (the Covenant Baal), Baal-zebub (Baal of the fly).

defs: The whole class of divinities to whom the name Baal was applied.
